name: 47_Network_Traffic_Analysis_KMeans_NetworkTraffic_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa uchambuzi wa trafiki ya mtandao kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Network Intrusion (CIC-IDS-2017) kutoka Kaggle. Pakia seti ya data na sanifisha data ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means clustering katika `src/model.py`. Tathmini makundi kwa kutumia kipimo cha silhouette na hifadhi matokeo ya tathmini chini ya `results/metrics/`. Hifadhi matokeo ya clustering kama `results/clustering_results.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya clustering na hifadhi picha kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`. Tengeneza dashibodi ya mwingiliano na Dash au Bokeh ili kuchunguza matokeo ya clustering, na hifadhi dashibodi chini ya `results/`. Hakikisha mfumo ni wa kimoduli ili mtumiaji aweze kubadilisha algoriti ya clustering haraka.

requirements.criteria: "Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017)" kutoka Kaggle imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data imesanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Silhouette coefficient" inatumika kwa tathmini. Matokeo ya tathmini yamehifadhiwa chini ya `results/metrics/`.
Matokeo ya clustering yamechapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/clustering_results.txt`.
Clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao imeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" imetengenezwa kuonyesha matokeo ya clustering na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `results/`.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchuja na kuchunguza makundi maalum kwa uchambuzi wa kina.
Michoro inapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya makundi tofauti, ikifanya iwe rahisi kutambua mifumo katika data ya trafiki ya mtandao.
Mradi unapaswa kuwa wa kimoduli, kuruhusu mtumiaji kubadilisha algoriti ya clustering kwa urahisi.

judge_stats.criteria: "Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017)" kutoka Kaggle imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the CIC-IDS-2017 dataset. It is a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder that only defines a `load_dataset()` function returning a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`. There is no actual code to read CSV files, connect to Kaggle, or load any real data. The file merely lists the requirement as a string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` without implementing it.

judge_stats.criteria: Data imesanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a string `"loaded"` and notes, while `build_transforms()` returns a list of strings like `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no actual data standardization code (e.g., using `StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or any normalization logic) implemented. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation" placeholder, meaning no real feature standardization is performed.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual implementation of the K-means clustering algorithm. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub code that lists K-means as a keyword in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS` lists, and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no actual K-means implementation (e.g., no use of `sklearn.cluster.KMeans`, no custom K-means logic with centroid initialization, distance calculation, cluster assignment, etc.). The file appears to be a minimal semantic stub created for benchmark judging purposes rather than a real implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: "Silhouette coefficient" inatumika kwa tathmini. Matokeo ya tathmini yamehifadhiwa chini ya `results/metrics/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows that `results/metrics/` directory exists but is empty (no files listed within it). Neither `data_loader.py` nor `model.py` contains any implementation of the Silhouette coefficient calculation or evaluation. The `model.py` only has a placeholder `build_model()` function with no actual K-means implementation or silhouette scoring. There is no evidence of silhouette coefficient being computed or its results being saved under `results/metrics/`.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya clustering yamechapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/clustering_results.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/clustering_results.txt` exists, but its content is just a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual clustering results. This indicates that real KMeans clustering was never performed and no meaningful clustering output (such as cluster assignments, centroids, cluster counts, or evaluation metrics) was saved to the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao imeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, lakini maudhui yake hayakuweza kusomwa kwa sababu ya hitilafu ya mfumo (`Error reading image file: litellm.BadRequestError`). Kwa hivyo, haiwezekani kuthibitisha kwamba picha hiyo ina uwakilishi sahihi wa clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao. Ushahidi wa moja kwa moja wa utekelezaji wa mchakato huu pia hauko katika trajekta iliyotolewa.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" imetengenezwa kuonyesha matokeo ya clustering na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `results/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa utekelezaji wa dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" katika mradi. Muundo wa mradi unaonyesha faili mbili tu za msimbo (`data_loader.py` na `model.py`) ambazo ni "placeholder" za msingi tu, na hazina msimbo wowote unaohusiana na Dash au Bokeh. Saraka ya `results/` ina faili moja tu ya maandishi (`clustering_results.txt`) na picha moja (`network_traffic_visualization.png`), lakini hakuna faili yoyote ya dashibodi ya mwingiliano. Trajekta pia inathibitisha kwamba kazi hii haijatekelezwa kabisa.
